---
applyTo: "functions.php,readme.txt"
---

# PHP and Readme Instructions

Use `ati_theme_2026_` function prefixes, `ati-theme-2026` asset handles, and `@package ATI_Theme_2026`. Do not enqueue a parent stylesheet dependency.

`readme.txt` must describe the standalone ATI Theme 2026 block theme and must not describe a child theme.
